<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-cṳ̄]][[de:Metall-Ratte]][[hak:Kâng-chṳ́]][[ja:庚子]][[ko:경자]][[vi:Canh Tý]][[za:Gengceij]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-chú]][[zh-yue:庚子]][[zh:庚子]]

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 37th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Earth Pig]] and followed by [[Yin Metal Ox]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kanoe (庚)]] represents yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Generation]]) (Metal generates Water). 
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Rat (庚子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 zi2
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: koushi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Years of Yang Metal Rat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 40 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yang Metal Rat]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Metal Rat (庚子)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 40|40 AD]]
* [[AD 100|100 AD]]
* [[160|160 AD]]
* [[220|220 AD]]
* [[280|280 AD]]
* [[340|340 AD]]
* [[400|400 AD]]
* [[460|460 AD]]
* [[520|520 AD]]
* [[580|580 AD]]
* [[640|640 AD]]
* [[700|700 AD]]
* [[760|760 AD]]
* [[820|820 AD]]
* [[880|880 AD]]
* [[940|940 AD]]
* [[AD 1000|1000 AD]]
|
* [[1060|1060 AD]]
* [[1120|1120 AD]]
* [[1180|1180 AD]]
* [[1240|1240 AD]]
* [[1300|1300 AD]]
* [[1360|1360 AD]]
* [[1420|1420 AD]]
* [[1480|1480 AD]]
* [[1540|1540 AD]]
* [[1600|1600 AD]]
* [[1660|1660 AD]]
* [[1720|1720 AD]]
* [[1780|1780 AD]]
* [[1840|1840 AD]]
* [[1900|1900 AD]]
* [[1960|1960 AD]]
|
* [[2020|2020 AD]]
* [[2080 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2140 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2200 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2260 AD]]
* [[24th century|2320 AD]]
* [[24th century|2380 AD]]
* [[2440 AD]]
* [[25th century|2500 AD]]
* [[2560 AD]]
* [[2620 AD]]
* [[2680 AD]]
* [[2740 AD]]
* [[2800 AD]]
* [[2860 AD]]
* [[2920 AD]]
* [[2980 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoto (辛)]] and [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[November]] is designated as the [[Month]] of [[Yang Metal Rat]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of [[Yang Metal Rat]] is the 8th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].

==See Also==
* [[Gengzi|Metal Rat (Xiliang)]] – The era name of the dynasty of [[China (region)|China]], during the [[Sixteen Kingdoms|Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period]], of the kingdom [[Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|Xiliang]], covering 400–404 AD.
<!--Yang Metal Rat--><!--Yang Metal Rat-->

{{wikidata link|Q904964}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
